article_meta.title: IdeasWhat History Says Will Happen Next in IranMilitant groups have become more violent, specifically against civilians,

reasoning: The model flagged mostly author prose but misapplied bias labels, included questionable flags, and missed clearer instances of author-level spin/word choice. One item also embedded a source quote within the flagged text, creating a minor attribution concern.

custom_reasoning.attribution_rule_compliance: Flagged span 3 includes a quoted phrase from Trump within the biasedText, creating a minor attribution issue even though the critique targeted surrounding prose.
custom_reasoning.false_positive_rate: Item 2 (Bias by Omission re: Soleimani) overreaches and relies on external context; Item 3 (Slant) reads neutral/validating language as dismissive. Item 1 could be defensible as opinion-as-fact but was framed as unsubstantiated.
custom_reasoning.false_negative_rate: Missed clearer author-level bias such as emotive/colloquial phrasing ('not blowing it up') and idiomatic framing ('paying the price'), as well as assertive causal claims presented as fact.
custom_reasoning.bias_type_accuracy: Mislabeling is significant: the first item fits better as Opinion Statements Presented as Fact; the second is not Bias by Omission; the third’s Slant rationale is weak.
